mapper.sql: id, organization_id, sync_mode, sync_status, dept_total, dept_success, dept_failed, user_total, user_success, user_failed, duration_ms, error_message, create_time, create_user
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from org_sync_log
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into org_sync_log (id, organization_id, sync_mode, sync_status, dept_total, dept_success, dept_failed, user_total, user_success, user_failed, duration_ms, error_message, create_time, create_user) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{organizationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{syncMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{syncStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptTotal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deptSuccess,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deptFailed,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userTotal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userSuccess,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userFailed,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{durationMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{errorMessage,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

mapper.update:
update org_sync_log
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
organization_id = #{record.organizationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sync_mode = #{record.syncMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sync_status = #{record.syncStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_total = #{record.deptTotal,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dept_success = #{record.deptSuccess,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dept_failed = #{record.deptFailed,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_total = #{record.userTotal,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_success = #{record.userSuccess,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_failed = #{record.userFailed,jdbcType=INTEGER},
duration_ms = #{record.durationMs,jdbcType=BIGINT},
error_message = #{record.errorMessage,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update org_sync_log set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, organization_id = #{record.organizationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sync_mode = #{record.syncMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sync_status = #{record.syncStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_total = #{record.deptTotal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dept_success = #{record.deptSuccess,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dept_failed = #{record.deptFailed,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_total = #{record.userTotal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_success = #{record.userSuccess,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_failed = #{record.userFailed,jdbcType=INTEGER}, duration_ms = #{record.durationMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, error_message = #{record.errorMessage,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update org_sync_log
organization_id = #{organizationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sync_mode = #{syncMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sync_status = #{syncStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dept_total = #{deptTotal,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dept_success = #{deptSuccess,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dept_failed = #{deptFailed,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_total = #{userTotal,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_success = #{userSuccess,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_failed = #{userFailed,jdbcType=INTEGER},

error_message = #{errorMessage,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update org_sync_log set organization_id = #{organizationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sync_mode = #{syncMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sync_status = #{syncStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_total = #{deptTotal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dept_success = #{deptSuccess,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dept_failed = #{deptFailed,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_total = #{userTotal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_success = #{userSuccess,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_failed = #{userFailed,jdbcType=INTEGER}, duration_ms = #{durationMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, error_message = #{errorMessage,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into org_sync_log (id, organization_id, sync_mode, sync_status, dept_total, dept_success, dept_failed, user_total, user_success, user_failed, duration_ms, error_message, create_time, create_user) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.organizationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.syncMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.syncStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.deptTotal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.deptSuccess,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.deptFailed,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.userTotal,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.userSuccess,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.userFailed,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.durationMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.errorMessage,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
